task_tokens_consumed: Is a recursive-interval-removal LR schedule construction anticipated by 2024-2026 prior art?

hypothesized_clusters.cluster_description: Smooth or piecewise-smooth LR schedules: cosine decay, linear warmup-decay, exponential, polynomial.
Warmup-stable-decay (constant middle, decay at end) LR schedules with cooldown.
Fractal step-size ordering for accelerated gradient descent (Agarwal-Goel-Zhang Chebyshev fractal).
SGDR cyclical LR restart, super-convergence, one-cycle policy.
Functional scaling laws, per-layer adaptive LR, loss-aware adjustment.

landscape_completeness_claim: Five LR-schedule clusters span standard smooth, WSD-plateau, fractal, cyclical, adaptive. Cantor middle-thirds specifically would fall under fractal cluster C3.
